commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b65d04e0bd587494a5aaf755a43cd3431b2c7a02)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes shared `/models` provider data to prune implicit CLI runtime alias provider rows when canonical providers already expose the same model, with regression tests for duplicate pruning and explicit legacy refs.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main adds canonical visible catalog rows and authenticated CLI runtime catalog rows, while the PR prunes those alias rows after `view: "all"` has loaded the full catalog. I did not run the tests or a live Telegram picker in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and a compatibility fix or maintainer decision for explicit CLI-runtime provider browse; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: fix(models): dedupe implicit CLI runtime aliases
target.body:
Summary
- Prune implicit CLI runtime alias provider rows from /models provider data when the canonical provider already owns the same model.
- Preserve explicit legacy CLI runtime refs, including configured exact refs and wildcard/provider-visible cases, so existing user configs do not disappear.
- Add regression coverage for duplicate alias pruning, explicit legacy preservation, and canonical models routed through CLI runtime policy.

Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-models.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/model-buttons.test.ts

Behavior addressed: /models browse provider lists can show duplicate choices such as anthropic and claude-cli for the same canonical model when CLI runtime aliases are implicit.
Real environment tested: local source checkout on macOS, Node-based repo test wrapper.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-models.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/model-buttons.test.ts
Evidence after fix: commands-models and Telegram model button tests passed in the same checkout after the branch was pushed.
Observed result after fix: 2 test files passed, 55 tests passed.
What was not tested: full repository test suite and live Telegram bot interaction.

Fixes #83342
target.author: kiranmagic7
